name: AUGMANITAI Terminology Reference (Issuer Template — Fictional Demonstration)
_note: This file is a FICTIONAL DEMONSTRATION TEMPLATE of a W3C Verifiable Credentials issuer profile applied to a terminology framework. It is NOT an active issuer; the keys, URLs, endpoints, uptime claims, expert validation claims, and revocation registries are PLACEHOLDERS. AUGMANITAI is descriptive linguistic-terminological research (§1) with non-peer-reviewed working-paper status (§11). No regulatory endorsement, no ISO certification, and no EU AI Office alignment has been asserted or obtained; any such wording in earlier drafts was removed per the disclaimer (§11, §16, §20). See DISCLAIMER.md in the repository root.

issuancePolicy.description: Demonstration-only credential profile attesting that a downstream work cites AUGMANITAI terminology as a linguistic-descriptive reference. No regulatory or diagnostic claim is ever asserted.
issuancePolicy.scopeOfAuthority: AUGMANITAI v1.0 and derivative terminology citations

credentialDefinitions.name: AUGMANITAI Terminology Citation Credential (demo)
credentialDefinitions.description: Fictional demonstration credential attesting that a downstream work cites AUGMANITAI terminology, including DOI, version, and terms referenced.

credentialDefinitions.name: AUGMANITAI Data Provenance Credential (demo)
credentialDefinitions.description: Fictional demonstration credential attesting to data sources and licensing (CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 for data; Apache-2.0 for code).

revocationRegistry._note: Placeholder only. No live status list is operated.

grounds: Citation claims are shown to be inaccurate

trust.trustFramework: None — self-sovereign author attestation only. No external endorsement has been obtained or implied.

trustIndicators.status: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 for data; Apache-2.0 for code

doesNotClaim: Diagnostic, medical, psychological, legal, HR, credit-scoring, insurance, surveillance, or profiling use (§20)
